decision: Path aliases use @/ prefix pattern (e.g., @/components, @/hooks, @/lib, @/screens, @/stores, @/types, @/theme, @/services, @/schemas, @/navigation, @/contexts, @/utils) mapped to src/ subdirectories
rationale: Standard convention in modern React/React Native projects. Provides clean imports without relative paths (../../../). Configured in both tsconfig.json (for TypeScript) and babel.config.js (for Metro bundler).

decision: Project root is /Users/matthewcheng/Projects/Time tracker/worktracker - all code is inside the worktracker subdirectory
rationale: Expo create-expo-app creates the project in a subdirectory named after the project slug

decision: Theme tokens use flat object structure with semantic naming: colors.primary, colors.text, spacing.md, fontSizes.lg. Access via useTheme() hook or direct import from @/theme.
rationale: Flat structure is simpler to use than nested (e.g., theme.colors.button.primary). Semantic names (primary, secondary, error) are more meaningful than generic (blue500). The useTheme() hook enables future support for theme switching (light mode).
